Student's Homework  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +3 MANA: +15
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF HEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Student's Homework
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +3 MANA: +15
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL

Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF HEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:1+1=3
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:108
Lucy Entry By:rale
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-31 08:05:13
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 170pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 35
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Tower of Frozen Shadow
NPC Name
an angry librarian


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Tower of Frozen Shadow
Dropped by the Angry Librarian


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
somtimes lucky
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 3:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258046091
15 posts
Ok heres the deal.
been here three times first two times for 4 hours each and no angre libriarian , the last time she poped after the first kill. did the same thing all three time by killing the libriarian then hte assistant , then pulled fromt the right side area and their she was ....

O well
▲ Page top
A nice gift
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 11:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777088096
40 posts
OMG. What a nice gift! I really like to thank to person who gave it to me but forgot his name.
All I know it was a Gnome.
▲ Page top
Homework is easy
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2002 at 3:18 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592758388216
Scholar
82 posts
Took the Librarians on the 2nd floor with a 40 SK and a 51 DRU. Had group tp ready just in case.

Stood at the zone-in to 2nd floor and pulled with spells.

In an error of judgement, we rooted the assistant librarian and pulled the librarian. Unfortunately this almost got us killed because the assistant sat back and nuked us both down to 20 percent health. Thank god she ran out of mana when she did. Hindsight says we should have just let them run to us. (Never root a nuker... :)

Tanking them the 2nd time was cake though for the 40 SK. Pulled with SK Heart Flutter debuff-dot, threw on DRU damage shield, snared them, and used the porcupine approach to dealing with multiple mobs. Didn't even need to heal, just lifetapped once or twice for fine tuning.

After those were dead (both blue to 40 SK) we just picked students off one at a time. Killed teacher too. After about the 7th or 8th light-blue student kill the Angry Librarian popped. Easy kill again, dropped Students Homework and key to the 3rd floor.

Edited, Tue Apr 2 03:19:54 2002
▲ Page top

# Oct 18 2001 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251463887
14 posts
Hello i need some help here. What lvl should I try the 2nd floor of the ToFS. I* want the Student's Homework badly. (mostly because i cheated on whatever it is)). What lvl should i be to be a group for the Angry Librarian, let alone the tower itself?

QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2001 at 7:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965856941
7 posts
I'm a lvl 37 warrior and myself along with a 35 cleric and 45 monk held the floor all night with the cleric never falling below 80mana

Oglethorpe Vengefulblade (Mandate of Honor)
Decorated War hero of the 38th season
Seeker of Justice in a World gone mad!
Vazaelle
▲ Page top
angry librarian
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 11:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761095521
1 post
myself and 3 others were on the second floor for almost 3 hours and cleared the whole floor at least 10 times. angry librarian never spawned and none of us had a key to the 3rd floor. we never made it any farther. I guess she is a pretty random spawn. We found a great way to clear the room. since there is a limit on 4 pulls at a time, we would have 3 people go out and pull 4 spawns each and bring them back to the little room where you jump in. then we had a level 49 wizard do his most damaging area effect for 849 to each of them and they would all die in one hit. we would kill 12 at a time. This gave me half a level in about 2-3 hours. It was great!
▲ Page top
students homwork
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 7:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757484819
2 posts
its not bd range slot item for a mag got it in no time with a 47 war
▲ Page top
cool
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 12:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757113487
Scholar
119 posts
myself and a few other mid 40's (monk, rogue, chanter) cleared the room easily 3 times before we got enough keys for everyone (just incase)
i got exp off some kills, and i got a homework as well.

the floor has low HP mobs, just that they're all casters (monk would go out full health, come back half everytime)

# Apr 19 2001 at 8:18 PM Rating: Excellent
Danalog
Code Monkey
7,476 posts
It drops off the Angry Librarian on the second floor... one of the more annoying floors, I went through about 5 full spawns on the floor before she popped.
As to what level the Angry Librarian is, I don't know, I'd guess in the 30s, I killed it easily, but I was 56 at the time.
